---
title: "Long Vacation, The"
---

## Long Vacation, The

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1895
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

This includes characters from <i>Scenes and Characters, The Pillars of the House, The Two Sides of the Shield </i>and <i>Beechcroft at Rockstone.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
